item.xeb.brass_knuckles.desc1: §eEquip in offhand, Curios hands, or bracelet slot.
item.xeb.brass_knuckles.desc2: §eHas a 20% chance to apply Bruise every 20 seconds.
item.xeb.brass_knuckles.desc3: §b§o"I'd swear this used to hurt more!"
item.xeb.mob_energy.desc1: §eGrants Strength II, Speed II, and Madness. §7(2 Uses)
item.xeb.mob_energy.desc2: §b§o"You feel like a monster dont you think?!"
item.xeb.tinfoil_hat.desc2: §b§o"i knew it from the start, everything was connected!"
item.xeb.demon_core.desc2: §eApplies Doomed for 10 seconds in the area.
item.xeb.holy_mantle.desc3: §b§o"A blessed garment protecting the pure of heart."
item.xeb.doomfist.desc1: §eHold right-click to charge a powerful punch.
item.xeb.doomfist.desc2: §eLaunches forward, dealing massive wall slam damage.
item.xeb.doomfist.desc3: §b§o"Our future will be forged in conflict."
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.desc1: §eHold right-click to charge a powerful punch.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.desc2: §eLaunches forward, dealing massive wall slam damage.
item.xeb.doomfist_v2.desc3: §b§o"The future has been forged, and it wasnt by me...."
item.xeb.moon_tear.desc2: §eForces visual and actual night for 24,000 ticks.
item.xeb.moon_tear.desc3: §b§o"A tear fallen from the blood moon..."
advancements.xeb.root.title: xEB Elite Buffs
advancements.xeb.survive_permanight.desc: Survive a complete Elite Permanight event.
advancements.xeb.elite_slayer_3.title: Giant Slayer
advancements.xeb.elite_slayer_3.descript: Defeat an elite mob with 3 or more active medallions.
advancements.xeb.evolved_champion.title: Supreme Evolution
advancements.xeb.evolved_champion.descri: Witness a mob evolving to its maximum limit of 5 medallions.
chat.xeb.permanight.start: §c§lThe night will endure until the strongest survives!
chat.xeb.permanight.end: §a§lThe Eternal Night has ended! You have survived.
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.1: §7The shadows whisper of weak, fragile elites appearing. Only bronze medallion tiers can be seen...
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.4: §eElites are growing stronger. Two medallions can now manifest, and silver tiers begin to glow...
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.7: §cThe ground shakes. Bosses are empowered by ancient medallions. Up to three buffs can merge, and legendary gold tiers emerge...
chat.xeb.mastery.desc.10: §4§lThe ultimate challenge is upon you. Elites wield up to four medallions of pure chaos, and gold tier items shine everywhere...
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc1: §eHold right-click to fire a continuous laser beam.
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc2: §eManage your energy — overuse triggers overheat cooldown.
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc4: §eHold [%s] for Cyclone Push §7(10s CD, pushes you backward)
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc5: §eHold [%s] for Gene Splice §7(8s CD, chains between enemies)
item.xeb.optic_blast.desc6: §b§o"If I could see what you see through those eyes..."
